tasks.title: Implement Voyager product page from source documentation
tasks.description: Build the Voyager page around the platform's real tourism, agent, map, and Scout exploration model.
tasks.details:
Scope:
- build hero and product framing
- explain stakeholder model (agencies, businesses, attractions, scouts)
- implement multi-agent and Scout experience sections
- add map/platform/content architecture summary
- end with partnership/contact CTA
tasks.testStrategy: Review implemented page against voyager README and docs to ensure product meaning, audience framing, and platform claims stay accurate.

subtasks.title: Implement Voyager hero and platform framing
Implement multi-agent system and Scout experience sections
Implement map/content/platform architecture summary and CTA

tasks.title: Restyle Voyager page with exploration, map, and destination branding cues
tasks.description: Translate Voyager tourism, geospatial, and exploratory identity into a more product-native public page treatment.
tasks.details:
Scope:
- extract color, map, and atmosphere cues from Voyager
- restyle hero, section surfaces, and supporting cards around exploration and place
- maintain structural consistency while making Voyager visually distinct
tasks.testStrategy: Manual visual review against Voyager source materials to confirm the page feels exploratory, geospatial, and destination-oriented without losing clarity.

tasks.title: Implement contact page
tasks.description: Create a clean contact page with relevant inquiry framing and simple pathways to reach Intrface.
tasks.details:
Scope:
- intro and inquiry framing
- contact methods or form
- what to reach out about
- optional links back to products/projects
tasks.testStrategy: Verify contact pathways are obvious and page remains clear and low-friction on mobile/desktop.

subtasks.title: Implement contact intro and inquiry pathways
Implement supporting product links and final CTA

tasks.title: Style the contact page as a clear conversion surface aligned with Intrface branding
tasks.description: Make the contact page feel intentional and trustworthy by aligning it with Intrface brand language and product-oriented inquiry paths.
tasks.details:
Scope:
- design contact sections and inquiry pathways with a stronger brand treatment
- connect outreach options to products, partnerships, and platform work
- ensure the page feels polished and conversion-ready rather than utility-only
tasks.testStrategy: Manual QA for clarity, trust, and conversion readiness on desktop and mobile.

tasks.title: Restructure intrface-site into a monorepo with dedicated web and AOC apps
tasks.description: Convert the current single-app repo into a monorepo that preserves the Intrface brand site while creating a dedicated app boundary for aoc.intrface.eu.
tasks.details:
Scope:
- move the current public site into a dedicated brand-site app
- create a dedicated AOC app shell for aoc.intrface.eu
- add minimal shared packages for durable branding, UI, and config concerns
- wire root workspace scripts so the repo can be developed and validated from the root
- keep the migration focused on restructure and immediate AOC implementation readiness
tasks.testStrategy: Validate root and app-scoped install, lint, build, and dev flows; verify the current web app still runs after relocation; verify the AOC app shell can boot cleanly.

tasks.title: Implement about page
tasks.description: Create the About page to explain who Intrface is, what it builds, and the principles connecting its products.
tasks.details:
Scope:
- intro/company framing
- what we build
- principles/how we work
- ecosystem relationship and CTA
tasks.testStrategy: Manual review for clarity, trust, and consistency with homepage/product messaging.

subtasks.title: Implement company intro and what we build sections
Implement principles, ecosystem narrative, and CTA

tasks.title: Style the about page to express Intrface as a coherent product studio and system practice
tasks.description: Ensure the About page carries a clear brand language and explains how Intrface connects its products through shared system thinking.
tasks.details:
Scope:
- define a stronger visual and narrative treatment for studio identity
- align section hierarchy with the product-led brand direction
- reinforce the relationship between Intrface and the flagship products
tasks.testStrategy: Manual review for brand coherence, readability, and consistency with the homepage and product pages.

tasks.title: Implement homepage narrative architecture and featured products
tasks.description: Build the Intrface homepage around brand positioning, featured products, shared capabilities, and clear CTA flow.
tasks.details:
Scope:
- implement hero and company positioning
- add what Intrface does section
- feature AOC, Voyager, and Funda
- add shared platform capabilities
- add trust/proof and final CTA sections
tasks.testStrategy: Manual narrative review plus route smoke testing to ensure product descriptions and CTAs are correct and scannable.

subtasks.title: Implement homepage hero and Intrface positioning
Implement featured products and shared platform capabilities
Implement trust/proof layer and final CTA

tasks.title: Refine homepage with Intrface brand system and flagship-specific visual cues
tasks.description: Evolve the homepage from a generic shared template into a stronger Intrface brand surface while previewing AOC, Voyager, and Funda through distinct visual signals.
tasks.details:
Scope:
- strengthen Intrface brand lockup, rhythm, and section styling
- give featured product cards stronger product-specific identity cues
- tighten hero and CTA styling so homepage feels like a finished public brand surface
tasks.testStrategy: Manual visual QA across locales and breakpoints to confirm hierarchy, brand consistency, and product-card differentiation.

tasks.title: Implement projects index page
tasks.description: Build the projects page as a scalable portfolio overview for flagship Intrface products.
tasks.details:
Scope:
- implement intro framing
- render product grid from content model
- add ecosystem/shared capability strip
- add CTA to contact or homepage
tasks.testStrategy: Verify all featured products render consistently and routes navigate correctly.

subtasks.title: Implement projects intro and flagship grid
Implement ecosystem strip and final CTA

tasks.title: Design the projects index as a branded portfolio surface with product-specific differentiation
tasks.description: Use the projects index to express the Intrface portfolio while clearly differentiating AOC, Voyager, and Funda through styling and positioning.
tasks.details:
Scope:
- give the projects grid stronger product-specific themes
- create shared portfolio framing that explains why these products belong together
- ensure project cards and transitions preview each product visual identity
tasks.testStrategy: Review the page for portfolio clarity, visual differentiation, and clean navigation into each flagship page.

tasks.title: Define site information architecture and configuration foundation
tasks.description: Establish route inventory, navigation model, brand constants, and baseline metadata configuration for the Intrface site.
tasks.details:
Scope:
- define launch sitemap
- create navigation/config helpers
- establish default metadata and company profile constants
- align implementation foundation with PRD launch scope
tasks.testStrategy: Type-check config imports and verify route/navigation usage from page components.

subtasks.title: Define launch sitemap and primary navigation
Create reusable site config and metadata defaults

tasks.title: Create typed project content model and seed flagship entries
tasks.description: Build the structured content layer for AOC, Voyager, and Funda so presentation can scale beyond one-off hardcoded sections.
tasks.details:
Scope:
- define ProjectEntry types
- create content records for AOC, Voyager, and Funda
- add lookup helpers for project detail routes
- keep content local and static-first for v1
tasks.testStrategy: Type-check content records and validate slug lookup behavior including unknown slug handling.

subtasks.title: Define ProjectEntry types and project lookup helpers
Seed flagship content entries for AOC, Voyager, and Funda

tasks.title: Build design primitives and shared section patterns
tasks.description: Create the reusable visual foundation for spacing, typography, section wrappers, and page containers.
tasks.details:
Scope:
- establish visual baseline for marketing pages
- create shared container and section-heading primitives
- ensure responsive layout patterns are consistent
- support a restrained editorial launch aesthetic
tasks.testStrategy: Render primitives in routes/components and verify responsive layout behavior manually plus lint/build checks.

subtasks.title: Create page container and section heading primitives
Establish spacing, typography, and visual baseline

tasks.title: Build shared layout shell and marketing components
tasks.description: Compose reusable header/footer and core marketing blocks that all launch routes can share.
tasks.details:
Scope:
- implement header and footer
- create hero, feature grid, CTA, and supporting section blocks
- wire shell components to site config
- avoid page-specific duplication where reusable components are appropriate
tasks.testStrategy: Render shell and marketing blocks across homepage/about/contact routes and verify clean lint/build output.

subtasks.title: Implement responsive header and footer shell
Build hero, feature grid, and CTA marketing sections

tasks.title: Build reusable project presentation components
tasks.description: Create reusable project list and detail components for flagship product storytelling.
tasks.details:
Scope:
- create project card, grid, hero, and detail section components
- support both overview and deep-dive page contexts
- map components cleanly to structured product content
tasks.testStrategy: Render all flagship entries in both list and detail contexts and verify stable behavior via lint/build checks.

subtasks.title: Build project card and grid components
Build project hero and reusable detail sections

tasks.title: Implement launch routes for homepage, projects, about, and contact
tasks.description: Ship the initial public route set for the Intrface brand and portfolio site.
tasks.details:
Scope:
- implement homepage
- implement /projects index
- implement reusable /projects/[slug] pages for AOC, Voyager, and Funda
- implement /about and /contact
- ensure navigation and route composition are coherent end to end
tasks.testStrategy: Manual route smoke test on desktop/mobile plus slug validation and metadata sanity checks.

subtasks.title: Implement homepage narrative and featured-project composition
Implement /projects index and dynamic /projects/[slug] route
Implement /about and /contact pages

tasks.title: Polish launch metadata, responsive QA, and release baseline
tasks.description: Finalize launch readiness with metadata polish, responsiveness checks, and repository documentation alignment.
tasks.details:
Scope:
- replace placeholder metadata
- run responsive QA sweep
- review accessibility basics
- update README/planning docs to match actual launch architecture
- prepare repo for iterative expansion after v1 baseline
tasks.testStrategy: Run lint/build, validate route metadata, and complete a manual launch-readiness checklist.

subtasks.title: Replace placeholder metadata and route titles/descriptions
Run responsive QA and update launch documentation

tasks.title: Implement Funda product page from source documentation
tasks.description: Create the Funda page around funding discovery, matching, and collaborative application workflows.
tasks.details:
Scope:
- build hero and problem framing
- explain role-based workflow model
- implement core capabilities and workspace flow
- add architecture credibility section and CTA
tasks.testStrategy: Compare page against Funda README and ensure audience/role framing remains accurate.

subtasks.title: Implement Funda hero, problem framing, and role model
Implement Funda capabilities, workflow, and CTA

tasks.title: Restyle Funda page with trust-heavy workflow and funding-platform branding
tasks.description: Strengthen the Funda page by aligning it with the product structured funding, application, and role-based workflow identity.
tasks.details:
Scope:
- extract visual cues from Funda product surfaces and docs
- apply calmer trust-oriented styling for workflow, role, and architecture sections
- ensure CTAs and section hierarchy feel more institutional and product-specific
tasks.testStrategy: Manual visual QA to confirm Funda reads as a serious funding workflow platform rather than a generic third product page.

tasks.title: Implement AOC product page from README-grounded content
tasks.description: Create the public AOC page using accurate source-truth from agent-ops-cockpit and eliminate fictionalized product framing.
tasks.details:
Scope:
- build AOC hero with correct naming
- implement why AOC section from README pain points
- implement Distributed Cognitive Architecture section
- implement unified workspace and capabilities sections
- add real install flow, proof, roadmap, and CTAs
tasks.testStrategy: Compare implemented page against agent-ops-cockpit README and verify all major sections are accurate and actionable.

subtasks.title: Implement AOC hero and Why AOC sections
Implement Distributed Cognitive Architecture and workspace sections
Implement capabilities, quick start, roadmap, and final CTA

tasks.title: Restyle AOC page using product-native cockpit and terminal branding cues
tasks.description: Bring the AOC page closer to the actual product by translating its terminal-first workspace identity into the public marketing surface.
tasks.details:
Scope:
- extract relevant branding cues from AOC visuals and docs
- apply more operator and cockpit styling to hero, panels, and CTA surfaces
- preserve Intrface shell while making AOC feel distinct from Voyager and Funda
tasks.testStrategy: Compare the page against AOC source materials and review whether the visual system reads as terminal-first, operational, and product-accurate.

tasks.title: Adopt Google Sans Flex and establish site-wide typography foundation
tasks.description: Set Google Sans Flex as the primary typeface and align the base typographic system with Intrface's outcome-led product minimalism.
tasks.details:
Scope:
- add Google Sans Flex to the app shell
- define primary text roles and hierarchy
- ensure typography works for marketing and product pages
- avoid placeholder font decisions drifting into implementation
tasks.testStrategy: Verify font loads in app shell, inspect hierarchy across pages, and confirm no regressions in build/lint.

subtasks.title: Wire Google Sans Flex into layout metadata and app shell
Define display, heading, body, and meta typography roles

tasks.title: Define AOC public-site information architecture and core messaging
tasks.description: Establish the dedicated AOC public subdomain as a product, education, and consulting surface with a clear route map and thesis.
tasks.details:
Scope:
- define homepage and supporting route architecture for apps/aoc
- lock primary positioning around terminal-first, local-first, structured agentic coding
- define CTA pathways for repo/docs, learn, and consulting
- keep the surface grounded in real AOC usage and source truth
tasks.testStrategy: Manual architecture and copy review to confirm the route map, thesis, and CTA paths are coherent and product-accurate.

tasks.title: Extract AOC product branding and cockpit-style visual direction
tasks.description: Translate the real AOC workspace, terminal environment, and public product cues into a concrete visual direction for the subdomain.
tasks.details:
Scope:
- audit AOC README, screenshots, and live session visuals
- identify palette, panel language, density, border, and status-strip motifs
- define how AOC public pages should feel distinct from intrface.eu while remaining in the same ecosystem
tasks.testStrategy: Manual visual review against actual AOC workspace materials to confirm the direction feels operator-native and product-accurate.

tasks.title: Build the AOC public-site shell, navigation, and reusable section primitives
tasks.description: Create the shared structural foundation for apps/aoc so deeper content can be added cleanly.
tasks.details:
Scope:
- implement app-level header/footer or equivalent shell
- create reusable page sections, proof blocks, and CTA patterns
- align primitives with the extracted cockpit-like visual direction
tasks.testStrategy: Run lint/build and verify the AOC app renders a coherent shell with reusable sections.

tasks.title: Implement the AOC homepage as the thesis, proof, and conversion hub
tasks.description: Turn the AOC homepage into the main public entry point that explains what AOC is, why it matters, and where users should go next.
tasks.details:
Scope:
- implement hero and product thesis
- explain why AOC differs from GUI-heavy and subscription-first tooling
- add real-use proof and audience paths
- provide strong CTAs into repo, install, learn, and consulting flows
tasks.testStrategy: Manual narrative review plus route smoke testing to confirm users can understand AOC and choose a next step from the homepage.

tasks.title: Implement AOC philosophy and product overview routes
tasks.description: Add the deeper explanatory surfaces that unpack the AOC worldview and system model.
tasks.details:
Scope:
- build philosophy route or equivalent sectioned surface
- build product overview route for context, memory, tasks, runtime, and workspace structure
- keep explanations accurate but public-friendly
tasks.testStrategy: Compare the pages against the AOC README and live product truth to ensure the worldview and architecture are communicated accurately.

tasks.title: Implement AOC learn, consulting, and install routes
tasks.description: Create explicit public pathways for education, service engagement, and practical product adoption.
tasks.details:
Scope:
- implement learn/training surface
- implement consulting surface
- implement install/get-started surface
- ensure CTA flows map clearly to user intent
tasks.testStrategy: Manual conversion-path review plus source-truth comparison for installation guidance.

tasks.title: Polish AOC CTA routing, metadata, and launch readiness
tasks.description: Finalize the AOC subdomain for public iteration with clearer conversion paths and baseline launch polish.
tasks.details:
Scope:
- refine CTA hierarchy across all AOC routes
- add route metadata and baseline SEO
- run responsive QA and fix launch-level issues
tasks.testStrategy: Run lint/build and complete a manual QA pass across all AOC routes and primary CTA paths.
